findings: Commander has explicit partial/failed status rules; success requires 50 SLs + 250 workers
Enforcement is instruction-based (prompt), not programmatically validated
Dead panes: remain-on-exit + orphan recovery, but no restart mechanism
Blast radius: shared repo checkout; branches isolate commits but not working dir
No fleet-level exit code aggregation; status per-agent JSON only
Depth Guard: prompt + toolset convention only; no server-side hard lock
